productDisplayName: Levis Women Work Western Red Shirt
description: Composition Red and grey check shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with a pleated button closure, a spread collar, buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water No bleaching Use warm iron only This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban female. Pair it with denims and canvas shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5.8' and chest 33"
